quality-gates-present.without_evidence: No npm audit or bundle size check present. Missing security audit and bundle size gates.
quality-gates-present.with_evidence: npm audit --audit-level=high added in build job. Bundle size check still missing but security audit gate is present. Lint, typecheck, test, build, integration, E2E, and security audit all present.

parallel-fast-jobs.without_evidence: lint and typecheck are in the same job (lint-typecheck). Unit tests depend on lint-typecheck via needs. They are not truly parallel independent jobs.
parallel-fast-jobs.with_evidence: lint, typecheck, and test are three separate parallel jobs with no needs dependencies between them.

dependency-caching.without_evidence: All jobs use setup-node with cache: 'npm' and npm ci.
dependency-caching.with_evidence: All jobs use setup-node with cache: 'npm' and npm ci.

build-artifact-caching.without_evidence: No actions/cache step for build artifacts (.next/cache, dist, etc.). Only npm dependency caching via setup-node.
build-artifact-caching.with_evidence: No actions/cache step for build artifacts. Only npm dependency caching via setup-node cache: 'npm'.

secrets-not-hardcoded.without_evidence: All secrets moved to ${{ secrets.* }} references. Top-level env block with hardcoded secrets removed.
secrets-not-hardcoded.with_evidence: All secrets moved to ${{ secrets.* }} references. No hardcoded credentials anywhere.

integration-needs-build.without_evidence: test-integration needs [lint-typecheck], not a build job. Integration tests run without a prior build step as a separate job.
integration-needs-build.with_evidence: integration job has needs: [build, changes], correctly depending on build completing first.

e2e-playwright-deps.without_evidence: npx playwright install --with-deps chromium step present in test-e2e job.
e2e-playwright-deps.with_evidence: npx playwright install --with-deps chromium step present in e2e job.

e2e-failure-artifacts.without_evidence: No upload-artifact step in test-e2e job to capture playwright-report on failure.
e2e-failure-artifacts.with_evidence: actions/upload-artifact@v4 with if: failure() uploads playwright-report/ directory.

integration-db-service.without_evidence: Postgres service container defined with health checks (pg_isready, interval, timeout, retries).
integration-db-service.with_evidence: Postgres service container defined with health checks (pg_isready, interval, timeout, retries).

no-concurrency-control.without_evidence: Concurrency group only on deploy-production job, not on CI jobs. No top-level concurrency group to cancel redundant runs on same branch.
no-concurrency-control.with_evidence: No concurrency group defined at workflow or job level. Multiple pushes to same branch will run simultaneously.

monorepo-path-filtering.without_evidence: No path filtering at all. All jobs run on every change despite being a monorepo.
monorepo-path-filtering.with_evidence: dorny/paths-filter@v3 used with api and web filters. Integration conditional on api changes, e2e conditional on web changes.

deploy-strategy-missing.without_evidence: Deploy is still a raw npm run deploy:production with no staged rollout, no canary, no rollback in the main workflow.
deploy-strategy-missing.with_evidence: Deploy is still a raw npm run deploy:production. No staged rollout (staging then production). Rollback is a separate workflow but deploy itself has no canary/staged strategy.

rollback-workflow.without_evidence: No rollback workflow or workflow_dispatch mechanism present.
rollback-workflow.with_evidence: Separate rollback.yml with workflow_dispatch accepting version input, runs npx vercel rollback.

staging-before-production.without_evidence: Deploys directly to production with no staging step or manual verification gate.
staging-before-production.with_evidence: No staging deployment step. Deploys directly to production after CI passes. No manual verification gate between staging and production.

pr-trigger-scoped.without_evidence: pull_request still triggers on branches: ['*'] (wildcard). Push still triggers on [main, develop, staging].
pr-trigger-scoped.with_evidence: pull_request scoped to branches: [main]. Push scoped to branches: [main]. No wildcard or extra branches.

ci-env-separation.without_evidence: DEPLOY_TOKEN and AWS_SECRET_KEY only in deploy-production job steps. Test jobs use separate CI_DB_PASSWORD. Deploy job uses environment: production.
ci-env-separation.with_evidence: DEPLOY_TOKEN and AWS_SECRET_KEY only scoped to deploy-production job step. CI uses separate CI_DB_PASSWORD for tests.
